blended.narrative: Meadowlark is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,543 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 25 mph. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 9.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 22".
